title: Rocket Lab Q3 Earnings Preview: Revenue Growth In Focus
text: Wall Street expected Rocket Lab to post revenue of $151.7 million and a narrower net loss of $0.06 per share for Q3 2023. Q3 revenue growth guidance was 19%, which represented an improvement over Q2 but was still not considered very impressive. Stifel analysts expected results to come in near the high end of the previous forecast, with a sequential increase in adjusted gross margin of 370 basis points. Additionally, Rocket Lab anticipated that Q3's gross margin would be comparable to Q2. The company was expected to continue showing a steady launch cadence with four launches in the quarter and benefit from a higher average selling price for the Electron launch vehicle, while also seeing a steady increase in its Space Systems business. The company had topped estimates in all four previous quarters.
